name: Dim 06 — Reproducibility infrastructure
what_it_solves: Full moat_comparison dimension #6: 'Reproducibility infrastructure' — Bev2026 approach vs CrisPRO approach with verbatim quote.
how_it_solves: Extracted verbatim from moat_comparison.comparison_dimensions[i]; raw dict carried in attributes.raw.
why_it_exists: Depth pass: previous stream flattened each dimension to a few fields. This entity carries every field the JSON contains for that dimension.

attributes.CrisPRO_approach: Repo crispro-backend-v2 + Synthetic-Lethality (public on GitHub). Canonical artifact provenance documented at e.g., 'github.com/fjkiani/crispro@d33f640:publications/00-mbd4-manuscript/mbd4_parp_response/artifacts/canonical_atr_wee1_rerun_20260405/canonical_atr_wee1_rerun.json'. Test coverage 10 unit tests at tests/synthetic_lethality/v3/multimodal/test_mbd4_atr_promotion.py at HEAD bfd6d11f.
attributes.moat_status: CrisPRO ADVANTAGE on code/artifact transparency. Bev2026's data deposition is strong; code withhold is a published limitation.
attributes.verification_status: Bev2026 Code Availability verbatim from PDF page 15. CrisPRO repo content from user-provided audit report transcript line 12288 + earlier worker-mounted verification.

raw.Bev2026_approach: Raw drug-screen data deposited to Zenodo 10.5281/zenodo.18957959. Code statement (verbatim): 'The underlying code for this study to pre-process drug screening image data is not publicly available but may be made available to qualified researchers on reasonable request from the corresponding authors.'
raw.Bev2026_score: DATA SHARED, CODE WITHHELD. Partial reproducibility.
raw.CrisPRO_approach: Repo crispro-backend-v2 + Synthetic-Lethality (public on GitHub). Canonical artifact provenance documented at e.g., 'github.com/fjkiani/crispro@d33f640:publications/00-mbd4-manuscript/mbd4_parp_response/artifacts/canonical_atr_wee1_rerun_20260405/canonical_atr_wee1_rerun.json'. Test coverage 10 unit tests at tests/synthetic_lethality/v3/multimodal/test_mbd4_atr_promotion.py at HEAD bfd6d11f.
raw.CrisPRO_score: OPEN CODE + CANONICAL ARTIFACT PROVENANCE. Higher reproducibility surface.
raw.moat_status: CrisPRO ADVANTAGE on code/artifact transparency. Bev2026's data deposition is strong; code withhold is a published limitation.
raw.verification_status: Bev2026 Code Availability verbatim from PDF page 15. CrisPRO repo content from user-provided audit report transcript line 12288 + earlier worker-mounted verification.

verbatim_evidence.note: verbatim quote from Bev2026 PDF as recorded at file creation time
